# elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic Daily Update (Apr 15, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity for April 15, 2026, focused on CI/CD infrastructure improvements to ensure consistent package publishing. No new features, bug fixes, or documentation updates were completed during this period.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **CI/CD Infrastructure**
    *   Initiated work to align the npm workflow and TypeScript package configuration to support standalone publishing. [#19](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/pull/19)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#19](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/pull/19): fix(ci): align npm workflow and TS package with standalone publish. This PR is currently open and awaiting review.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
